signals.title: USD/JPY — COT vs OIS Divergence + BoJ
signals.text: With USD/JPY at 157.03, the 300bp carry differential continues to favor the USD, yet specs are short −88.5k, opposing the BoJ's implicit hike bias, with 40% of a hike priced in. This divergence sets up a short-squeeze risk, as the market is positioned against the direction the BoJ is signaling. The next BoJ meeting on 28 Apr will be a key catalyst for this trade, potentially triggering an unwind of speculative shorts.
